name: How Query Visibility Changes KV-Cache Compression Rankings: A Matched-Budget Audit
summary: arXiv:2607.11942v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: KV-cache compression methods are predominantly evaluated with the query appended to the context before compression -- a query-aware protocol. Yet t...
description: arXiv:2607.11942v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: KV-cache compression methods are predominantly evaluated with the query appended to the context before compression -- a query-aware protocol. Yet the economic case for a compressed KV cache is reuse: compress a document once, answer many future questions against it. In that deployment, compression must happen query-agnostic -- before any questio...
author: Daming Luo, Christy Liang, Junyu Xuan
